roles.content: Argumentation theory: A comprehensive examination of argumentation theory within Logic & Epistemology, exploring foundational concepts, key arguments, and contemporary interpretations.
Critical perspectives on argumentation theory: Examining objections, alternative frameworks, and limitations of dominant approaches to argumentation theory.
roles.source: British Journal for the Philosophy of Science

roles.content: Recent developments in argumentation theory: Current research trends, emerging debates, and new applications of argumentation theory in contemporary philosophy.
